title: What pistol did Misato use in Vol 5 of the manga
display_title: What pistol did Misato use in Vol 5 of the manga
wikitext:
[]: What pistol did Misato use in Vol. 5 of the manga?             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Thu Feb 05, 2009 12:18 pm It was definitely a Heckler & Koch USP but I can't figure out what calibre it was. .40 cal., 9mm, .45 ACP, .357 Sig? Does anyone have any insight? I happen to own a USP 40 and if it turned out that I owned Misato's gun, it would definitely give me a warm and fuzzy. Plus, it's a bitchin' piece!

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Feb 05, 2009 3:57 pm Chronicle , IIRC, shows it as a USP 45, though a USP 9 would be the realistic choice for deployment in Germany or Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Thu Feb 05, 2009 10:35 pm What's Chronicle?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 05, 2009 10:43 pm http://www.evageeks.org/fgp/Evangelion_Chronicle ^That.

[]:             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Thu Feb 05, 2009 11:01 pm Cool. If they were smart they would've used .40 cal. It's more controllable for smaller people and won't overpenetrate walls, so all that multi-billion dollar equipment at Nerv HQ would be safe.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Feb 06, 2009 1:35 am SAWgunner wrote: If they were smart they would've used .40 cal.

[]:             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Fri Feb 06, 2009 12:06 pm I don't think any military uses .40. Although some US law enforcement is moving towards that in light of the nine-mil's patent inability to bring down tweakers and crackheads. Special forces seem to be using .45s now for the same reason (Iraqi insurgents seem to be fond of Angel Dust).
